item.title: Trade Marks Fee Update 2025
item.description: IP Australia has updated trade mark application fees effective 1 July 2025.
item.content:encoded: IP Australia has updated trade mark application fees effective 1 July 2025. The new fee for a standard application will be $330 per class.

item.title: Patent Opposition Changes
item.description: Changes to the patent opposition process take effect from 1 August 2025.
item.content:encoded: The Intellectual Property Laws Amendment Act 2025 introduces changes to the patent opposition process, including extended time limits and new grounds of opposition.

item.title: Designs System Modernisation
item.description: IP Australia announces a modernised Designs examination system commencing 1 March 2026.
item.content:encoded: IP Australia announces a modernised Designs examination system commencing 1 March 2026. The new system will reduce examination timelines from 12 months to 6 months.
